name: Island Park Village Pickleball Courts
description: Island Park Village Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Island Park, ID. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, food, and wheelchair accessibility. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Merrill Rose Memorial Park
description: Merrill Rose Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Saint Anthony, ID. There are 5 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
